speeches.speaker: YHWH God
speeches.englishText: From every tree of the garden you may surely eat

speeches.speaker: YHWH God
speeches.englishText: but from the tree of the knowledge of good and evil you shall not eat, for in the day that you eat of it you shall surely die

speeches.speaker: YHWH God
speeches.englishText: It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a helper fit for him
